Quality Assurance

Every lot passes through our six-step QA gauntlet.

1. Sourcing

Farmer collective selection & seasonal lot booking.

2. Inbound QC

Sortex, de-stoning, magnetic & metal separation.

3. Lab Test

Moisture, ASTA color, oil %, aflatoxin & pesticide residues.

4. Packaging

Lot-coded, nitrogen-flushed export-grade packaging.

5. Logistics

FCL / LCL export with full compliance documentation.

6. Certified Delivery

Certificate of Analysis, phytosanitary & traceability.

Elfurat Spices is a global exporter of premium Indian spices, aromatics, nuts and pantry staples - engineered for retail brands, HORECA and industrial food manufacturers worldwide.

APEDA FSSAI FDA ISO Spice Board of India
